title: The Diffusion of Biotech Crops in the Argentine Agriculture Sector
summary: The Diffusion of Biotech Crops in the Argentine Agriculture Sector
body: Presented at Workshop on Agricultural Biotechnology for Development: Institutional Challenges and Socio-economic Issues in Bellagio, Italy, 30 May - 1 June, 2005 Note This paper is a draft for comment, not citation.
